source_notes: Common Tigrinya bound prefixes/suffixes documented in standard reference grammars (e.g. negation circumfix ay-...-n as used in the MoVoC paper's own worked example, relative/definite ze-, verb subject-agreement prefixes y-/t-/n-/'e-, possessive suffixes -na/-kum/-u/-a). Reasonable, citable starting rule set -- NOT a claim of completeness or independent expert verification (unlike the project's real 206-word manually annotated Tigrinya morpheme set in data/, which remains the authoritative gold resource).
